arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “We're coming into the closing stretch of the season and every game could be decisive”
arts.sum: The closing stretch of the season starts tomorrow, we have a lot of games and we have to get it right." The coach had the following to say about the game: “The team is in pretty good shape.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth's Andoni Iraola addresses Tottenham links & Dean Huijsen's future amid Real Madrid speculation
arts.sum: Bournemouth head coach Andoni Iraola addresses speculation linking him with Tottenham Hotspur as well as discussing Dean Huijsen's future at the Premier League club.

arts.ttl: Every Liverpool player to leave for Real Madrid & how they fared in Spanish capital
arts.sum: Every Liverpool player who has joined Real Madrid and how they fared at the Santiago Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti addresses concerns that Los Blancos quartet could face UEFA ban for Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti is confident that Kylian Mbappe, Vinicius Junior, Antonio Rudiger and Dani Ceballos will all be available for the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti gives one-word response to Brazil rumours in Real Madrid press conference
arts.sum: “No” – Carlo Ancelotti insists that there has not been any contact with the Brazilian...

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti could face four years in prison as Real Madrid boss to stand trial in Spain
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti will need to be present at his court hearing, it has been claimed, with the Italian at risk of a prison sentence over alleged tax fraud

arts.ttl: Real Madrid predicted lineup vs Leganes - La Liga
arts.sum: How Real Madrid could line up for Saturday's La Liga clash with Leganes.

arts.ttl: Liverpool accused of rolling out the red carpet for Real Madrid to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Liverpool have been described as having rolled out the ‘red carpet’ for Real Madrid to clinch their transfer deal for Trent Alexander-Arnold. The England international, who is due to be out of contract at Anfield this summer, is now widely reported as being close to finalising a move to the Bernabeu on a free transfer. […] The post Liverpool accused of rolling out the red carpet for Real Madrid to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: New footage reveals the x-rated moment that risks Kylian Mbappe being BANNED against Arsenal in the Champions League
arts.sum: UEFA announced on Thursday that they are investigating the behaviour of four Real players following their last-16 victory over arch-rivals Atletico Madrid earlier this month.

arts.ttl: I hope fans accept me - Courtois ends Belgium exile
arts.sum: Belgium goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois says he hopes "fans can accept me" after ending his exile from international football this week.
